# Transcrição: Luis_Carlos_Flores

- **Fonte:** Luis_Carlos_Flores
- **Duração:** 04:40
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

## [00:00 - 03:06]

We knew that what we were teaching was so important and so valuable. And once we got in the room, even people who didn't sign up for it, they were sold after they saw what we delivered for them, where we took them. So we knew what we did was really important for so many parents, for so many kids. But it was so hard to sell. I'm Luis Carlos from Mexico, and I teach parents how to be really great parents. So here I am, fighting it out every day, feeling this deep need, this urge to accomplish this mission. And deep inside, I felt incongruent because I had to spend so many hours out there working to get the sale, to get the message out. And sometimes I felt like I was failing in my business and to my family. I was pretty much deciding that this wasn't for me. So then one day Gabi walks up to me and she says, hey, you really need to see this. And she tells me it's this new thing, this new internet marketing thing that we hadn't seen before. And I just didn't want to look at it. I was pretty much lost. But I said, OK, you know what? Whatever makes you feel good. And that's why I met Jeff. And I started watching his videos. And immediately I knew something was different there. And something inside me told me, if I do this, if I go ahead and do this, this might just work. So when I decided to go for it, to make this first launch, I had only a very basic know-how that I was getting from Jeff. And I was pressed for time because I had already announced a workshop that was going to happen in three weeks. And then the miracle happened. All of a sudden, everything that I had tried for the past year online had not added up to the results I had in my first time ever at launch, which, looking back to it, it was

## [03:06 - 04:40]

full of mistakes. It was not a great launch. It was put up in a rush, in a hurry. But it worked. It worked. It was beautiful. So after that first launch, we knew we had to try it again. So we teamed up. We really studied everything. And we knew we could do much better than that first launch. And a couple of months later, we forexed the results that we had on our first launch. But it's been two years after that second launch, and our growth has been incredible. We have an office, and we have a team that supports everything that we're doing that are completely into our mission to reach all these Latin American families all over the world and really have an impact in their homes, in their quality of lives, and in the love that they receive from their parents. We're helping transform an entire generation of parents and children. And as for me, I now have a chance to really be there with my kids, to really be the parent that they deserve and that I've always wanted to be. That is priceless.
